items: Oral Communication on Closed Session Items Only
If you have public comment related to a Closed Session item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Closed Session Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Reconvene to Regular Session at Approximately 7:00 p.m.
Report Out on Closed Session from September 1, 2021
Welcome by the School Board President, Alisa MacAvoy
Additions, Deletions or Modifications to the agenda.

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.

First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 5145.9 - Hate Motivated Behavior
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 5141.4 - Child Abuse Prevention and Reporting

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 13.4 (Approval of Local Interagency Agreement(s) to Provide Education and Training to Credential Candidates) was moved from Action Items to Consent Items. Items 13.1, 13.2, and 13.3 were discussed as Action Items with discussion before voting.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Do I have a motion to approve? So moved. Second. All right, so Maria made the motion. Janet seconded it. Roll call vote Kusty Wells. Aye. Trustee Lawson. Aye. Trustee Marquez. Aye. Vice President Diazlocum. Aye. President Macabre. Aye.
